name: REDCapAgentRexiTools
description: REDCapAgentRexiTools is a lightweight External Module scaffold for RExI-specific agent tools used by the SecureChatAI agent orchestration system.

escalation_create.description: Agent tool: create an escalation ticket in the configured escalation project

escalation_list.description: Agent tool: list escalation tickets for the current user with optional status filter

escalation_get.description: Agent tool: fetch details for a specific escalation ticket by record_id

project-settings.name:
Enable Debug Logging
(optional) Requires installation and configuration of emLogger

system-settings.name:
Escalation Project ID
Project that stores escalation tickets
Enable Debug Logging (system-wide)(optional) Requires installation and configuration of emLogger
